name: greenfield
//scripts: ROOT SCRIPTS are the developer interface. Run these from the repo root (e.g. `pnpm dev`, `pnpm test`). Each root script delegates to a workspace member via `pnpm --filter <pkg>` or `pnpm -r`. Workspace members (apps/web, packages/db, packages/money) ALSO have a `package.json` with their own scripts — those are an implementation detail. Add a script here (root) only when you want it invokable as `pnpm <script>`; member scripts that the root delegates to stay in the member's `package.json`.
